title: OpenMuCF FAIR rate ledger (curated compilation with provenance)
description: The OpenMuCF rate ledger as a standalone, citable dataset: the microscopic muon-catalyzed-fusion rates, the pre-registered validation targets, the uncertainty-quantification priors, and the muon-production energy-cost compilation. Every row carries its bibliographic source, physical conditions, uncertainty, and an established/contested tag (per-row provenance in references.bib; unresolved-identifier tracking in bib_unresolved.txt). This is a curated compilation with provenance of published values, not an independently evaluated nuclear-data library. Structure and field schemas are described by datapackage.json. The software that generates and audits from this ledger is deposited separately (Apache-2.0); this dataset is CC-BY-4.0.
notes: STAGED, NOT YET MINTED. This is the future dataset-deposit metadata for the ledger, to be minted by the maintainer as a separate Zenodo record once the corresponding software release is tagged. The related_identifier points to the software concept DOI (10.5281/zenodo.21251511, version-independent). Do not publish automatically.
